description: hotglue is an embedded integration and ETL platform for SaaS products. It lets developers add customer-facing integrations, run sync jobs, and manage connector flows and tenants.
summary: hotglue exposes a REST API at `https://api.hotglue.com` and an npm-distributed `hotglue` CLI; both authenticate with hotglue-issued API keys, and some tenant-scoped widget/API operations additionally use a signed JWT.
